addTrustedEmbedHint.message: Add a trusted web page when it belongs beside your dashboard.

apodVideoOpenHint.message: Today's APOD is a video - open in a new tab

appDesc.message: Nouvel onglet — NTP composable haute performance avec météo, flux, signets, crypto et plus.

bookmarksPermissionDeniedPanel.message: Bookmarks permission denied. Grant access to show this panel.

bookmarksPermissionPrompt.message: Bookmarks permission not granted. Vantage only reads bookmarks after you allow access.

calendarEmptyHint.message: Add an iCal URL in Settings -> Calendar.

calendarNoEvents.message: No events in the next $1 days.

chooseLayoutSubtitle.message: Start with the dashboard pace you want. Every choice stays editable later.

coingeckoConfiguredKeyRateLimit.message: Your configured API key hit a rate limit. Wait a few minutes, then refresh the panel.

coingeckoKeylessRateLimit.message: Keyless requests are rate-limited aggressively. Wait a few minutes, or add a free demo API key in Settings -> Crypto for more quota.

coingeckoRateLimited.message: CoinGecko rate-limited this request - try again later.

coingeckoRejected.message: CoinGecko rejected the request - your API key may be invalid or missing.

coingeckoSetupKeyPrefix.message: Set up a free CoinGecko demo API key (no credit card) at

coingeckoSetupKeySuffix.message: , then paste it into Settings -> Crypto.

countdownsEmpty.message: No countdowns yet - click + to add one.

cryptoNoPrices.message: No prices returned for the configured coins.

cryptoNoPricesHintPrefix.message: Check the coin IDs in Settings -> Crypto. CoinGecko expects lowercase IDs (e.g.

cryptoNoPricesHintSuffix.message: ), and some IDs change when projects rebrand.

embedEmptyHint.message: Add a valid web URL in Settings -> Embeds.

enterEmbedTitle.message: Enter a title for the embed.

enterValidWebUrlNoCredentials.message: Enter a valid web URL without a username or password.

feedDefaultEmptyHint.message: Add a feed in settings to get started.

feedsFailedDetail.message: Failed: $1. Check your connection or these feed URLs.

floodTooltip.message: River discharge $1 m3/s - 7-day max $2 m3/s - $3 risk

githubRateLimited.message: GitHub API rate-limited this request - try again after $1

githubSetUsernameHint.message: Set your GitHub username in Settings -> GitHub to see your activity.

githubShowingCached.message: Showing cached GitHub data - API rate-limited until $1.

historyPermissionPrompt.message: History permission not granted. Enable it from Settings -> History search to use this panel.

inboxCheckingLinks.message: Checking $1 link(s) - this sends HEAD requests to each URL.

inboxDuplicatesRemoved.message: $1 duplicate(s) across $2 URL(s). Keeping newest, removing older copies.

inboxEmpty.message: Your inbox is empty. Save tabs here for later.

inboxForgottenCount.message: $1 item(s) saved more than 30 days ago.

inboxHygieneToolsTitle.message: Find duplicates, forgotten items, or broken links

inboxNoSaveableTab.message: No saveable tab found in this window.

inboxSavePreviousTabTitle.message: Save the tab you were viewing

inboxTabPermissionDenied.message: Tab permission denied - use Add URL instead.

layoutPresetFocusedTagline.message: Search, quick links, and two panels.

nasaApodNotAvailable.message: NASA APOD is not available for today's date yet - trying again after $1.

nasaApodRateLimited.message: NASA APOD is rate limited - add a free API key in Settings -> Photo, or try again after $1.

nasaApodRejected.message: NASA APOD rejected this request - check the API key in Settings -> Photo, or try again after $1.

newsEmptyHint.message: Add a news feed URL in Settings -> News.

noSyncNoTracking.message: No sync. No tracking. No profile.

noteFocusPlaceholder.message: Type... or paste lyrics, a script, a speech.

notesEmpty.message: No notes yet - click + to add one.

onboardingDoneSubtitle.message: Your preferences are saved locally on this device. You can refine the setup from Settings.

permissionDeniedWidgetDisabled.message: $1 permission denied. The widget stays disabled.

personalizeSubtitle.message: Add a greeting name and weather city now, or leave either blank for a clean start.

quickpickHint.message: Cancel to keep the default engine unchanged

radarNoLocationHint.message: Set a city in Settings -> Weather to center the radar.

readingListPermissionDeniedSave.message: Reading List permission denied. Grant access to save feed items.

readingListUnavailable.message: Reading List is unavailable in this browser.

rssEmptyHint.message: Add an RSS or Atom feed URL in Settings -> Reading list.

setCustomSearchUrlPlaceholder.message: Set a custom search URL in settings

settingsAccentColorHint.message: Color for buttons, toggles, and highlights.

settingsBlurHint.message: Softens image and video wallpapers only.

settingsBodyFontHint.message: Used for paragraph text, list items, and most UI surfaces.

settingsBookmarksMaxHint.message: Maximum number of bookmarks to display.

settingsBrightnessHint.message: Tunes image and video wallpapers behind panels.

settingsCoinsHint.message: Comma-separated CoinGecko IDs (e.g. bitcoin, ethereum, solana, dogecoin).

settingsDaysAheadHint.message: How many days of upcoming events to show (1–30).

settingsDisplayFontHint.message: Used for headings, the greeting hero, and large numerical displays.

settingsFilterEmpty.message: No settings match that filter. Try a widget name, feature, or privacy setting.

settingsFilterHint.message: Filter by widget, privacy setting, feed, or visual preference. Matching sections open automatically.

settingsHistoryMaxResultsHint.message: Cap on items returned per search (5–100). chrome.history.search defaults to 100.

settingsInboxMaxHint.message: Hard cap on inbox size (50–1000). Oldest entries drop off when exceeded.

settingsNasaApiKeyHint.message: Get a free key at api.nasa.gov — removes rate limits.

settingsRadarLayerHint.message: Which data layer to display on the radar.

settingsReadingListHint.message: URLs you want to follow personally — RSS or Atom.

settingsRefreshMinutesHint.message: How often to poll for new prices.

settingsShowBookmarksPanelHint.message: Tiles from your browser’s bookmark library.

settingsShowCompletedTasksHint.message: Keep done items visible (strikethrough) rather than hiding them.

settingsShowConverterPanelHint.message: Convert between length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, and data units.

settingsShowCountdownsPanelHint.message: Count down (or up) to named dates — launches, vacations, deadlines.

settingsShowCryptoPanelHint.message: Live prices from CoinGecko. A free demo API key is recommended — without one, CoinGecko rate-limits aggressively.

settingsShowGithubPanelHint.message: Your public activity and trending repos from the GitHub API.

settingsShowNotesPanelHint.message: Color-coded sticky notes stored in your browser.

settingsShowPhotoPanelHint.message: A daily photo panel — changes every day.

settingsShowQuoteBannerHint.message: A daily quote shown between the hero and the reading panels.

settingsShowTodoPanelHint.message: A personal task list that persists across sessions.

settingsShowTrendingHint.message: Show the Trending tab (top repos created in the last 7 days).

settingsShowWorldClocksHint.message: A compact strip of clocks for multiple time zones, shown below the hero.

settingsShowZenShelfHint.message: Free-position sticky notes on the dashboard. Drag to move, resize from the corner.

settingsStarredMaxHint.message: Hard cap; oldest entries drop off when exceeded (10–500).

settingsTrendingLanguageHint.message: Filter trending repos to a specific programming language.

settingsUploadImageHint.message: Stored locally in your browser; cleared images fall back to the theme gradient.

settingsUsernameHint.message: Your GitHub handle — used for the Activity tab. Leave blank to show only Trending.

sidePanelEmptyHint.message: Add an RSS / News feed in Settings -> Reading list or News.

sidePanelKicker.message: News and reading list in one stream.

starredEmpty.message: No starred items yet - tap the star icon on any feed headline to pin it here.

stickerImageEmpty.message: Double-click to add an image URL.

todoEmpty.message: No tasks yet - add one above.

topSitesPermissionDeniedRow.message: Top Sites permission denied. Grant access to show this row.

topSitesPermissionPrompt.message: Top Sites permission not granted. Vantage only reads most-visited sites after you allow access.

weatherSetCityTitle.message: Set a city in Settings -> Weather to enable

weatherUnavailableSetCity.message: Weather unavailable - set a city in settings

widgetPickerSubtitle.message: Toggle dashboard modules and add live embeds.
